audit_items.proof_trace: checkUpkeep iterates all s_allowlistedAssets.values() (L228) performing per-asset external calls (oracle latestRoundData via _getAssetPrice, IERC20.balanceOf × 2); the proof fails because applyAllowlistedAssetUpdates in FeeAggregator.sol (L319) enforces no maximum on the set size, making gas consumption O(n) and unbounded. With ~250–500 assets, gas exceeds Chainlink Automation's checkGasLimit (~5M), permanently disabling automated auction management.
audit_items.attack_scenario: ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE gradually allowlists enough fee token assets that checkUpkeep gas exceeds Chainlink Automation's gas limit; upkeep checks always fail, blocking all auction starts and closes, leaving fee tokens stuck in the aggregator indefinitely.
